title: New Moon
description: The dark mirror. Light nothing tonight. Sit with the want before you name it.

title: Full Moon in Scorpio
description: Walk outside after midnight. She sees you whether or not you see her.

title: New Moon in Gemini
description: Write two letters: the one you will send, and the one you will burn.

title: Full Moon
description: The longest light. Anoint the throat and speak the thing you have been swallowing.

title: Summer Solstice
description: The year's crown. Wear gold today. Walk through the world as if every door knows your name.

title: New Moon in Cancer
description: Home is not a place — it is a body, yours, that you have been learning to stay inside.

title: Full Moon in Capricorn
description: What did you build this year? Crown it. What did you dismantle? Bless that too.

title: New Moon in Leo
description: Begin. Whatever it is. Tonight is the only right night.

title: Full Moon in Aquarius
description: Who have you been performing for? Tonight you perform for no one. Dance anyway.

title: New Moon in Virgo
description: Tend the body like the altar it is. No harshness. Only devotion.

title: Full Moon in Pisces
description: Dream with your eyes open. Write what rises before sunrise takes it.

title: New Moon in Virgo
description: What needs clearing before the turning? Name it. Release it without ceremony — that is the ceremony.

title: Autumn Equinox
description: Equal dark, equal light. You do not have to choose between softness and fire. You are both.

title: Full Moon in Aries
description: She burns brightest when no one is watching. Tonight, let her.

title: New Moon in Libra
description: Balance is not stillness. It is the constant small corrections of someone who knows where she is going.

title: Samhain — The Thinning
description: The veil is thinnest tonight. Speak the names of those who made you possible. Light something in their direction.

title: Full Moon in Taurus
description: The body remembers what the mind tries to forget. Let it remember tonight. Be gentle.

title: New Moon in Scorpio
description: Descend. This is not the same as falling. You chose the stairs.

title: Full Moon in Gemini
description: Say the contradictory true things out loud, both of them, without apology.

title: New Moon in Sagittarius
description: The arrow has been notched all year. Loose it.

title: Winter Solstice
description: The darkest turning. Light one candle. Not because it is enough — because it is yours.

title: Year's End
description: What will you burn before midnight? Write it down. We are watching.

title: Full Moon in Cancer
description: Return to the body that carried you through this year. She earned tenderness tonight.

title: New Moon in Capricorn
description: Name one thing you are building this year. Say it aloud. Now it is a vow.

title: Full Moon in Leo
description: You do not need to earn the spotlight. You only need to step into it.

title: New Moon in Aquarius
description: What would you do if no one needed to understand it? Begin that.

title: Full Moon in Virgo
description: Devotion is detail. Every small act of care tonight is liturgy.

title: New Moon in Pisces
description: The dreaming time. What you vision tonight is not escapism. It is scouting.

title: Spring Equinox
description: She returns. The ground cracks open because it cannot hold her anymore. Neither can you.

title: Full Moon in Libra
description: Beauty is not vanity. Beauty is refusal — to let the world make you ugly.

title: New Moon in Aries
description: The year's first fire. What are you beginning? Light it from yourself.
